name: Server Seeding Mode
description: Restrict players to the MOB area until enough players connect (one-way exit).
attributes:
[Attribute("0", UIWidgets.CheckBox, "Enable server seeding mode", category: "Seeding")]
protected bool m_bServerSeedingEnabled;

[Attribute("0", UIWidgets.EditBox, "Players needed to exit seeding (0=disabled)", "0 128 1", category: "Seeding")]
protected int m_iServerSeedingThreshold;
notes: Add IRON_SeedingRestrictionZoneEntity child on each MOB with m_bAutoSizeToHQ 1
Add SCR_CampaignSpawnPointGroup with m_bOnlyShowDuringSeeding 1 near MOBs
Drive state with an Iron_SeedingSystemManager: seeding=true on init, flip to false once threshold crossed (permanent)
